M-APP.NAME: Flask App
M-APP.purpose: Flask web-server v3: DB-backed API + proxy for detail/log + background backfill + per-generation AI summarize
M-APP.depends: M-DB, M-SYNC, M-KEYS, M-STATIC, M-BACKFILL, M-ANOMALY, M-GEN-SUMMARY-STORE, M-LLM-GEN-SUMMARIZE, M-LLM-ANTHROPIC

fn-config.PURPOSE: Auth config + keys from DB + sync status

fn-detail.PURPOSE: Proxy to generation detail — resolves token from DB

fn-log.PURPOSE: Proxy to generation log — resolves token from DB

fn-gen_summarize.PURPOSE: POST /api/generation/summarize — per-generation AI analysis via Haiku 4.5

fn-gen_summaries_batch.PURPOSE: POST /api/generation-summaries — batch prefetch cached summaries by ID list

fn-session_summarize.PURPOSE: POST /api/session/summarize — session-level summary (only when session_id exists)

M-DB.NAME: Database Layer
M-DB.purpose: SQLAlchemy ORM: api_keys + generations + session_summaries + generation_summaries tables in PostgreSQL

m-api_keys.PURPOSE: Registered API keys with sync metadata (last_sync_at, total_synced)

m-generations.PURPOSE: Cached generation records: includes session_id, device_id, source_key_name

m-session_summaries.PURPOSE: LLM summaries cache: session_id PK, source_key, summary, topic, is_work, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_cost

m-generation_summaries.PURPOSE: Per-generation LLM summaries cache: generation_id PK, summary, topic, is_work, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_model, llm_cost, cache_creation_tokens, cache_read_tokens, input_tokens, output_tokens

fn-init_db.PURPOSE: Create tables on startup (all four tables via Base.metadata.create_all)

fn-to_dict.PURPOSE: Serialize ORM objects to API-compatible JSON

M-SYNC.NAME: Sync Worker
M-SYNC.purpose: Background thread: incremental sync every 5 min from Polza.AI API to PostgreSQL. Enriches session_id/device_id from metadata.externalUserId on sync

fn-sync_key.PURPOSE: Sync single key — fetches only new records since last_sync_at

fn-upsert.PURPOSE: INSERT ON CONFLICT UPDATE — dedup by generation id

fn-enrich_session.PURPOSE: Parse metadata.externalUserId JSON → session_id + device_id for synced records

annotations.constraint-buffer: SYNC_BUFFER=2min overlap to catch boundary records

M-BACKFILL.NAME: Session Backfill
M-BACKFILL.purpose: Background thread: enrich session_id/device_id for historical records where session_id IS NULL. Server-side — survives page refresh

fn-worker.PURPOSE: _backfill_worker thread — processes batches of 50, handles errors, supports stop

fn-status.PURPOSE: GET /api/sessions/backfill/status — JSON: running, enriched, remaining, errorMsg, lastUpdate

annotations.constraint-error_pause: Auto-pauses if 45+ errors per batch (API rate limit)
annotations.constraint-batch_size: 50 records per batch, 0.5s delay between batches
annotations.coverage-note: Only 25% of generations have session_id (1991/7970 as of 2026-04-21). Backfill helps where externalUserId is present in Polza.AI metadata; the rest stays without a session anchor — semantic grouping by AI-topic is the workaround.

M-KEYS.NAME: Key Parser
M-KEYS.purpose: Parse API keys from Excel (tab-separated), .env, free text

fn-parse_keys_text.PURPOSE: Parse Name\tKey format from Excel paste

M-STATIC.NAME: Frontend Assets
M-STATIC.purpose: SPA dashboard: table, charts, sidebar, detail modal with embedded AI-analysis, topic-grouping tab, backfill indicator

fn-state.PURPOSE: Global state management (S object): items, filtered, summary_{id}, sessSum_{sid} caches

fn-render.PURPOSE: Table rendering with ai-cell (compact), pagination, summary cards, charts

fn-render_ai_section.PURPOSE: Render AI analysis block INSIDE detail modal — empty state with 'Проанализировать' button or filled state with topic/summary/flags/session sub-block

fn-render_ai_cell.PURPOSE: Compact table cell: grey 🧠 (unanalyzed) or chip with topic + flag icons (analyzed, tooltip has full text)

fn-run_gen_analysis.PURPOSE: Trigger POST /api/generation/summarize — manual only, no auto-calls

fn-run_session_analysis.PURPOSE: Trigger POST /api/session/summarize from within detail modal sub-block

fn-prefetch_summaries.PURPOSE: Batch POST /api/generation-summaries — populates AI cells on page load from DB cache

fn-bulk_analyze.PURPOSE: Mass-analyze unanalyzed rows in a 'По темам AI' group — concurrency=3, progressive UI ⏳ N/total

fn-group_items.PURPOSE: Grouping: flat, day, model, key, topic (AI-topic semantic grouping); unanalyzed rows go to '🤖 Без AI-анализа' bucket

fn-charts.PURPOSE: Chart.js analytics: timeline, models, cache, keys

fn-detail.PURPOSE: Modal with full log — backend resolves token. Now embeds M-LLM-GEN-SUMMARIZE results on top.

fn-backfill_ui.PURPOSE: Topbar indicator: ⏳/✅/❌ status, polling every 2s, start/stop/retry buttons

fn-key_filter.PURPOSE: Dropdown filter by API key name

annotations.css-classes: ai-cell, ai-cell-empty, ai-cell-done, ai-cell-personal, ai-block, ai-block-header, ai-block-empty, ai-block-body, ai-topic-big, ai-summary-text, ai-session-block, ai-session-header, ai-session-body, topic-group-header, topic-group-unanalyzed, btn-group-analyze, summary-work-badge, summary-flags

M-SUMMARY-STORE.NAME: Session Summary Store
M-SUMMARY-STORE.purpose: SQLAlchemy model + CRUD for session_summaries table — caches LLM summaries per chat session

m-session_summaries.PURPOSE: ORM model: session_id PK, source_key, summary, topic, is_work, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_cost, timestamps

fn-summary_get_or_none.PURPOSE: Get summary by session_id, return None if not cached

fn-summary_upsert.PURPOSE: INSERT or UPDATE summary for a session_id

fn-summary_list_by_key.PURPOSE: List summaries for an employee within date range

M-GEN-SUMMARY-STORE.NAME: Generation Summary Store
M-GEN-SUMMARY-STORE.purpose: SQLAlchemy model + CRUD for generation_summaries table — persistent cache of per-generation AI analysis results. 100% cost savings on repeated views.

m-generation_summaries.PURPOSE: ORM model: generation_id PK, summary, topic, is_work, project_guess, risk_flags, llm_model, llm_cost, cache_creation_tokens, cache_read_tokens, input_tokens, output_tokens, created_at, updated_at

fn-gen_summary_get_or_none.PURPOSE: Fetch cached summary for a generation, or None

fn-gen_summary_get_many.PURPOSE: Batch fetch by list of generation_ids — returns dict {id: to_dict(), ...}. Used by frontend prefetch on page load

fn-gen_summary_upsert.PURPOSE: INSERT or UPDATE summary with full usage metrics

fn-gen_summary_delete.PURPOSE: Remove cached summary — triggers regeneration on next request (force=true path)

M-LLM-ANTHROPIC.NAME: Anthropic API Integration
M-LLM-ANTHROPIC.purpose: Direct Anthropic Messages API integration (NOT proxied through Polza). Native payload format with prompt-caching support.

config-LLM_API_URL.PURPOSE: Anthropic endpoint URL, default https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages, overridden from .env

config-LLM_MODEL.PURPOSE: Model ID or alias. Default 'claude-haiku-4-5' (alias without date — Anthropic auto-serves latest Haiku 4.5 snapshot)

config-LLM_API_KEY.PURPOSE: Anthropic API key (sk-ant-api03-*). Separate from POLZA_API_KEY. Loaded from .env at startup.

format-headers.PURPOSE: x-api-key + anthropic-version: 2023-06-01 + content-type: application/json. NO Authorization: Bearer.

format-payload.PURPOSE: system is TOP-LEVEL array with cache_control blocks (NOT a message). messages contains only user/assistant turns.

format-response.PURPOSE: content[].text for output (NOT choices[0].message.content). usage.{input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_creation_input_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens}.

prompt-caching.PURPOSE: cache_control: {type: ephemeral} on system block. Haiku 4.5 minimum = 2048 tokens; current system prompt is ~350 tokens so cache is a no-op until prompt grows. Silently accepted by API.

pricing-haiku4_5.PURPOSE: input $1/M, output $5/M, cache_write $1.25/M, cache_read $0.10/M — used in _llm_call_summarize to compute cost_usd in response.

M-LLM-GEN-SUMMARIZE.NAME: Generation Summarizer
M-LLM-GEN-SUMMARIZE.purpose: Per-generation LLM analysis. Checks DB cache first; on miss, fetches Polza log, extracts user text, calls Anthropic, stores result. Manual trigger only (user clicks button in detail modal).

fn-api_generation_summarize.PURPOSE: POST /api/generation/summarize — body: {generationId, force?}. Returns cached result or fresh LLM output.

fn-api_generation_summaries_batch.PURPOSE: POST /api/generation-summaries — body: {ids: [...]}. Bulk prefetch for table render. Cap 500 ids.

fn-api_generation_summary_delete.PURPOSE: DELETE /api/generation/summary?generationId=... — drop from cache, forces regeneration on next call.

fn-llm_call_summarize.PURPOSE: Helper: builds Anthropic payload with cache_control, calls API, parses JSON from response content, computes cost. Raises on HTTP non-200 or empty content.

fn-extract_user_text_from_log.PURPOSE: Helper: concatenate user-role messages from Polza log (fallback to any-role content if empty), cap at 4000 chars.

prompt-GEN_SUMMARIZE_PROMPT.PURPOSE: Extended prompt — requests 3-5 sentence detailed summary with action, context, technologies, goal. Strict JSON output schema.

annotations.output-schema: {generationId, summary, topic, isWork, projectGuess, riskFlags[], llmModel, llmCost, cacheCreationTokens, cacheReadTokens, inputTokens, outputTokens, cached}

M-SESSION-SUMMARIZER.NAME: Session Summarizer
M-SESSION-SUMMARIZER.purpose: LLM-powered summarization of a chat session — extracts task, topic, work/personal classification from user messages across all generations in a session

fn-summarize_single_session.PURPOSE: Summarize single session — returns from cache or calls LLM (Anthropic native). Now uses prompt caching on system block.

fn-api_session_summarize.PURPOSE: POST /api/session/summarize — body: {sessionId}. Accessible only when generation has session_id (sub-block in detail modal).

annotations.deprecated-endpoints: POST /api/session/summarize-all and GET /api/session/summarize/status still exist in code but are unreachable from current UI — kept for backwards compatibility.

M-ANOMALY.NAME: Anomaly Detector
M-ANOMALY.purpose: Detect suspicious usage patterns: off-hours, weekends, unusual models, burst activity. Functions remain in polza_dashboard.py but no UI consumes them after simplify-ui refactor.

fn-detect.PURPOSE: Analyze employee records, return anomaly list with type/severity/details

annotations.status-note: UI removed in simplify-ui refactor (2026-04-21). Anomaly concept migrated into AI risk_flags returned by M-LLM-GEN-SUMMARIZE.

M-EMPLOYEE-REPORT.NAME: Employee Report API
M-EMPLOYEE-REPORT.purpose: Fast aggregated report per employee — pure SQL, no AI. Endpoints remain callable but no frontend consumer after simplify-ui refactor.

fn-report_list.PURPOSE: GET /api/employee-report/list — summary: each employee with cost/tokens/requests

fn-report.PURPOSE: GET /api/employee-report — single employee: sessions, anomalies, heatmap, models

annotations.status-note: UI tab '📊 По сотрудникам' removed in simplify-ui refactor. Endpoints kept for potential future re-use or external integrations. Not wired to current SPA.

Constraints.constraint-sort: Polza.AI API supports only sortBy=createdAt|clientCost; DB supports all columns
Constraints.constraint-cache: cached_tokens in prompt_tokens_details = cache READ (hit); prompt_tokens - cached = cache WRITE (miss)
Constraints.constraint-sync: Sync every 5 min; incremental (only new records since last_sync_at - 2min buffer)
Constraints.constraint-token_resolv: Detail/log proxy resolves token from DB by source_key_name → api_keys.token
Constraints.constraint-threaded: Flask threaded=True required for non-blocking operation
Constraints.constraint-session_metadata: session_id/device_id from metadata.externalUserId JSON — only via detail API, NOT list API
Constraints.constraint-backfill_survives: Backfill runs in server thread — survives browser refresh, stoppable via API
Constraints.constraint-deploy: GitHub main → git fetch/reset on VM at /home/user/POLZA/ → restart Flask. Single working copy since consolidation 2026-04-21.
Constraints.constraint-llm_alias: LLM_MODEL in .env should be 'claude-haiku-4-5' (alias) for auto-latest; fixed date versions (e.g. claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) pin a specific snapshot.
Constraints.constraint-llm_manual: AI analysis is never auto-triggered. User must click "🧠 Проанализировать" button in detail modal. Cost is disclosed in UI ($0.002).
Constraints.constraint-llm_cache_first: /api/generation/summarize ALWAYS checks DB cache first unless force=true. No silent recomputation.
Constraints.constraint-session_coverage: Only ~25% of generations have session_id (sparse Polza.AI metadata). Session-level features must gracefully degrade when session_id is absent; semantic topic grouping is the fallback for aggregated views.
Constraints.constraint-prompt_cache_min: Anthropic prompt caching requires ≥2048 tokens for Haiku 4.5. Current system prompts are smaller, so cache_creation_input_tokens=0 is expected — DB cache provides the economy instead.
